data.content:
activity duration,time management	GVG副本
副本有效时间
GVG副本的整个活动周期由预设的副本有效时间控制，时间归零则副本结束。

data visualization,real-time update	GVG副本UI界面
副本积分
副本积分的数据在GVG副本UI界面上以颜色区分的文本框形式实时展示给玩家。

distribution method,player notification	GVG副本奖励
系统邮件
GVG副本奖励通过系统邮件的方式发放给符合条件的联盟所有成员。

data management,tool functionality	关卡编辑器
黑板功能
黑板功能是关卡编辑器的核心组件之一，用于加载和管理外部配置数据以供设计使用。

competition outcome,scoring system	GVG副本
副本积分
副本积分是GVG副本中用于评判对战双方胜负的核心数据，在UI上实时显示。

countdown display,time tracking	GVG副本UI界面
副本有效时间
副本有效时间的剩余时长以倒计时文本的形式在GVG副本UI界面上显示。

configuration reference,data loading	玩法配置表
黑板功能
黑板功能的主要作用是加载玩法配置表，使其数据可供关卡编辑器中的触发器和条件使用。

battle record,information storage	副本战报
建筑
争夺建筑产生的战报除了发送给玩家，还会被缓存在该建筑中供双方查看。

parameter setting,tool configuration	关卡编辑器
编辑器配置文件
编辑器配置文件为关卡编辑器提供必要的配置，定义其加载的表格和运行参数。

information display,user interface	GVG副本
GVG副本UI界面
GVG副本UI界面是为GVG副本专门设计的，用于向玩家展示关键的副本积分和倒计时信息。

data representation,team identification	副本积分
我方联盟
副本积分中，我方联盟的当前得分在UI上用蓝色文本框进行标识和显示。

player category,reward eligibility	GVG副本奖励
参战成员
GVG副本奖励体系中包含专门针对参战成员的奖励类型。

content structure,format standardization	副本战报
沙盘战报
GVG副本内战报的格式与沙盘战报的格式保持一致。

data representation,team identification	副本积分
对方联盟
副本积分中，对方联盟的当前得分在UI上用红色文本框进行标识和显示。

data provisioning,parameter source	触发器
黑板功能
黑板功能加载的配置表数据可以作为关卡编辑器中触发器的参数。

event stage,process flow	GVG
Matching Phase
The Matching Phase is a specific stage within the overall GVG event process.

activity conclusion,reward system	GVG副本
GVG副本奖励
GVG副本活动结束后，系统根据战斗结果通过GVG副本奖励对联盟成员进行结算。

data provisioning,parameter source	条件
黑板功能
黑板功能加载的配置表数据可以作为关卡编辑器中条件的参数。

combat stage,event culmination	Battle Instance
GVG
The Battle Instance is the final combat stage of the GVG event that opens at a scheduled time.

competition,pairing	Alliance
Opponent Alliance
Alliances are matched against an Opponent Alliance during the GVG Matching Phase.

player category,reward eligibility	GVG副本奖励
未参战成员
GVG副本奖励体系中包含专门针对未参战成员的奖励类型。

accessibility,spectator mode	GVG副本
GVG观战功能
GVG观战功能是GVG副本的附属特性，允许未参与战斗的玩家进入副本场景观看战斗。

communication,player update,status update,system communication	Matching Phase
Notification Email
Notification Emails are sent to players to communicate the start and end of the Matching Phase.<SEP>Notification Emails are triggered and sent to players when the Matching Phase starts and ends.

information reveal,status change	Battle Instance
UI Interface
When the Battle Instance opens, the UI Interface reveals previously hidden opponent alliance details like name and server ID.

requirement,validation	Entry Conditions
Player
Players must satisfy all Entry Conditions, such as having no troops created, to be allowed into the GVG Battle Instance.

automatic victory,unmatched status	Bye Win
Odd Alliance
If an Odd Alliance remains unpaired after matching, it is directly marked to receive a Bye Win in the next stage.

configuration,rule setting	GVG副本
GVG玩法配置表
GVG副本的有效时间等核心参数通过GVG玩法配置表进行设置和管理。

information display,user interaction	Matching Phase
UI Interface
During the Matching Phase, the UI Interface displays countdowns and alliance information, with opponent details hidden.

protection,status effect	Player
Shield Effect
Upon first entering the GVG Battle Instance, a Player's main city in their home server automatically receives a Shield Effect.

pairing logic,process outcome	Matching Phase
Odd Alliance
The Matching Phase may result in an Odd Alliance if the number of alliances is odd and one cannot be paired.

access,participation	Battle Instance
Player
Players can enter the Battle Instance manually via the UI, provided they meet the Entry Conditions.

information display,time tracking	Countdown Timer
UI Interface
The Countdown Timer is a key component displayed on the UI Interface to inform players of time remaining.

restriction,unit management	Entry Conditions
Troops
One of the Entry Conditions for a Player is not having created any Troops.

instance management,navigation	Battle Instance
Exit Button
The Exit Button within the Battle Instance allows a player to leave and return to their Home Server.

origin location,server affiliation	Home Server
Player
A Player originates from and has a Main City located on a specific Home Server.

information provision,user guidance	Help Text
UI Interface
Help Text is displayed on the UI Interface to provide players with instructions and information.

building state,restriction	Entry Conditions
Inner City Hospital
One of the Entry Conditions requires the Player's Inner City Hospital to contain no Wounded Soldiers.

navigation,user interface	GVG Activity Interface
Game Main Interface
The GVG Activity Interface is opened from the Game Main Interface.

access control,user interaction	Enter Button
UI Interface
The Enter Button is part of the UI Interface, allowing players to manually enter the Battle Instance.

ownership,primary settlement,status check	Main City
Player
A Player owns and operates a Main City in their Home Server.<SEP>A Player owns a Main City, which must not be in a combat state as a prerequisite for entering the GvG Instance.

eligibility,participation	Alliance
Registration Stage
The Registration Stage allows eligible Alliances to register for the GVG activity.

interface navigation,user action	Registration Button
Registration Details Interface
Clicking the Registration Button opens the Registration Details Interface.

information presentation,stage display	GVG Activity Interface
Preview Stage
During the Preview Stage, the GVG Activity Interface displays the activity name and the countdown until the Registration Stage begins.

protection application,status effect	Main City
Shield Effect
The Shield Effect is applied to the Player's Main City in their Home Server upon entering the Battle Instance.

configuration,selection	Battle Session
Registration Details Interface
Within the Registration Details Interface, players select from available Battle Sessions for the GVG activity.

city status,restriction	Entry Conditions
Main City
One of the Entry Conditions requires the Player's Main City to not be in a combat state.

data creation,finalization	Registration List
Submit Registration Button
Clicking the Submit Registration Button for the first time creates and locks the initial Registration List for the alliance.

functionality access,stage transition	GVG Activity Interface
Registration Stage
When the GVG activity progresses to the Registration Stage, the Registration Button becomes available within the GVG Activity Interface.

member selection,roster management	Alliance
Registration Details Interface
Within the Registration Details Interface, players select participating members from their Alliance.

finalization,scheduling	Battle Session
Matching System
The Matching System determines the final Battle Session time for an alliance based on its initial selections.

communication,confirmation	Notification Email
Submit Registration Button
A successful click of the Submit Registration Button triggers the sending of a Notification Email to all alliance members.

eligibility,inclusion	Player
Registration List
The Registration List consists of specific Players selected from the Alliance to participate in the GVG activity.

condition setting,rule definition	Alliance
GVG Configuration Table
The GVG Configuration Table defines the eligibility conditions and restrictions that an Alliance must meet to register.

capacity,implementation limit	Framework Demo Version
Registration List
In the Framework Demo Version, the maximum number of players allowed on a Registration List is capped at 5.

data loading,parameter management	Blackboard
Play Configuration Table
The Blackboard loads data from the Play Configuration Table to make it available as parameters for triggers and conditions.

authority delegation,rank management	Alliance
Alliance Permission Table
The Alliance Permission Table configures which ranks within an Alliance have the authority to perform GVG registration.

parameter configuration,scheduling	Battle Session
GVG Configuration Table
The GVG Configuration Table is used to configure the total number of Battle Sessions (M) and the maximum number a player can select (N).

parameter setting,tool configuration	Editor Configuration File
Level Editor
The Level Editor uses the Editor Configuration File to define which external tables are loaded and to set its own operational parameters.

global coordination,scheduling	Battle Session
UTC Time
Battle Sessions are scheduled based on UTC Time to allow players from different time zones to participate.

data integration,editor interface	Blackboard
External Configuration Table
The Blackboard loads data from External Configuration Tables, making the data selectable via dropdown lists in the editor tool interface.

requirement specification,rule enforcement	Alliance
GVG Gameplay Rules Table
The GVG Gameplay Rules Table specifies the alliance ranks required for a player to have GVG registration permissions.

data association,parameter provisioning	Blackboard
InstanceTag Table
Based on the InstanceGroup Id, the InstanceTag Table loads specific character ID data into the Blackboard for use in triggers and conditions.

membership,notification,organization,selection,team formation	Alliance
Player
Players are members of an alliance and can be selected or deselected for the GVG activity sign-up list.<SEP>Players are members of an Alliance, and the Alliance organizes them into teams for GVG participation.<SEP>Players are members of an Alliance, and the Alliance's member list is used to create the GVG Registration List.<SEP>A Player belongs to an Alliance. All players in both Alliances receive Notification Emails about the GvG Instance's status.

association key,data lookup	InstanceGroup Id
InstanceTag Table
The InstanceGroup Id is used as a key to look up and load associated data from the InstanceTag Table into the Blackboard.

association key,data lookup	InstanceGameConfig Table
InstanceGroup Id
The InstanceGroup Id is used as a key to look up and load associated constant values from the InstanceGameConfig Table into the Blackboard.

data organization,sub-component	InstanceTag Table
RpgRole Sheet
The RpgRole Sheet is a specific page within the InstanceTag Table containing data about roles.

constant provisioning,key-value association	Blackboard
InstanceGameConfig Table
Associated via InstanceGroup Id, the InstanceGameConfig Table provides constant values to the Blackboard for use as trigger parameters.

component registration,tool configuration	Editor Configuration File
RpgRole Sheet
The Editor Configuration File is used to register the RpgRole Sheet (and its loadable fields) from the InstanceTag Table for use in the editor.

logic modification,variable management	Blackboard
Custom Variable
The Blackboard manages Custom Variables, which can be used and modified by trigger logic and condition judgments.

data referencing,identifier composition	Field Name
Sheet Name
The Sheet Name and Field Name are proposed to be combined to form a unique identifier for fields loaded from external tables into the Blackboard.

data organization,gameplay configuration	GVG Instance Configuration
InstanceGameConfig Table
The GVG Instance Configuration is a specific sheet/page within the InstanceGameConfig Table that holds configuration constants for GVG gameplay.

configuration,reference	GVG Activity
InstanceTag Table
The InstanceTag table contains the tag settings that define the selection rules for the GVG activity.

logic execution,parameter usage	Blackboard
Trigger
Triggers use data (from configuration tables or custom variables) loaded in the Blackboard as parameters to execute their logic.

data organization,gameplay configuration	InstanceGameConfig Table
Seroli Instance Configuration
The Seroli Instance Configuration is a specific sheet/page within the InstanceGameConfig Table that holds configuration constants for Seroli gameplay.

interface,management	GVG Activity
UI
The UI provides the interface for players to interact with and manage their alliance's participation in the GVG activity.

participation,submission	Alliance
Registration Phase
Alliances participate in the GVG activity by submitting their sign-up lists during the Registration Phase.

automation,execution	Matching Phase
Matching Server
The Matching Server executes the matching process automatically during the Matching Phase.

logic evaluation,parameter usage	Blackboard
Condition Judgment
Condition Judgments use data (from configuration tables or custom variables) loaded in the Blackboard as parameters to evaluate logic.

aggregation,sum	Player
Total Alliance Combat Power
The Total Alliance Combat Power is calculated by summing the personal combat power of each Player in the sign-up list.

sequence,stage	GVG Activity
Registration Phase
The Registration Phase is the first stage in the GVG activity process where alliances submit their participant lists.

design reference,structural similarity	Constant Table
InstanceGameConfig Table
The InstanceGameConfig Table is implemented in a way similar to the Constant Table, using an integer id and key-value pairs.

application,logic	Matching Rules
Matching Server
The Matching Server applies the configured Matching Rules to find suitable opponents for alliances.

data source,definition,rule definition,storage	InstanceTag Table
Tag
The rules for selecting which tags are available or required are defined within the InstanceTag table.<SEP>Tags and their selection rules for the GVG activity are defined and stored within the InstanceTag table.

organization,processing	Match Queue
Matching Server
The Matching Server organizes alliances into Match Queues based on their selected sessions for the pairing process.

management,submission	Alliance
Sign-Up List
An alliance manages and submits its Sign-Up List containing selected players for the GVG activity.

calculation,criteria	Matching Rules
Total Alliance Combat Power
The Matching Rules use the Total Alliance Combat Power as the primary data point for pairing alliances.

sequence,stage	GVG Activity
Matching Phase
The Matching Phase follows the Registration Phase in the GVG activity, where opponents are determined.

feedback,validation	Sign-Up Button
System Prompt
A System Prompt is shown when clicking the Sign-Up Button if the submission is invalid due to a player having left the alliance.

display,presentation	Tag
UI
Tags are displayed flatly (平铺) within the UI without complex controls like sliders or dropdown menus.

exception handling,resolution	Bye Win
Matching Rules
The Matching Rules include the Bye Win condition to handle alliances that remain unpaired after the matching process.

implementation,management	Configuration File
Event Classification And Abstraction
Event classification and abstraction is implemented and managed through the use of configuration files.

access,view	GVG Interface
Player
Players from alliances that did not sign up or are ineligible can only access a specific, limited GVG Interface after the registration phase.

aggregation,component	Personal Combat Power
Total Alliance Combat Power
Total Alliance Combat Power is an aggregate value composed of the sum of each selected player's Personal Combat Power.

display,interaction	Sign-Up List
UI
The UI displays the Sign-Up List, allowing users to select, lock, or remove players based on their status.

framework,tool dependency	Map Editor
NodeCanvas
The Map Editor tool is built within or depends on the NodeCanvas framework, which requires an upgrade.

allocation,scheduling	Matching Rules
Session
The Matching Rules process involves allocating alliances that selected multiple Sessions to appropriate Match Queues.

decision,dependency	Blackboard Function
Trigger
The decision on whether to supplement trigger requirements is dependent on the finalization of the Blackboard function.

component,functionality	Brush
Map Editor
The Brush is a functional component of the Map Editor tool.

impact,problem	Memory Leak
NodeCanvas
The current version of NodeCanvas suffers from a memory leak problem that is very disruptive to development.

instantiation,type	Timer Class Trigger
Trigger
The Timer Class Trigger is a specific type of trigger that instantiates the general trigger concept.

interface,usability	Map Editor
User Experience (UE) Correction
The UE correction is applied to the Map Editor's interface to improve usability by highlighting selected controls.

effect,visualization	Brush
Grid Information
The Brush's size and color settings are correctly visualized on the Grid Information in the scene.

resolution,upgrade	NodeCanvas
Version 3.2.5
NodeCanvas needs to be upgraded to version 3.2.5 to resolve the existing memory leak issue.

editing,placement	Map Editor
Neutral Building
The Map Editor supports the editing and placement of Neutral Buildings.

customization,designation	Blocking Area
Brush
The Brush can be used to set a custom color for designating Blocking Areas.

point generation,territorial control	Alliance
Neutral Buildings
Alliances compete to occupy Neutral Buildings, which then periodically generate points for the occupying alliance.

interface standard,visual feedback	Selection-Type Control
User Experience (UE) Correction
The UE correction mandates that all selection-type controls must be highlighted to provide clear visual feedback of their selected state.

classification,development phase	Map Editor
Tool Requirement
The Map Editor is classified as a tool requirement, meaning it does not need to undergo testing verification at this stage.

customization,designation	Brush
Walkable Area
The Brush can be used to set a custom color for designating Walkable Areas.

military assault,occupation	Neutral Buildings
Player
Players can attack Neutral Buildings using personal or rallied troops to eliminate the garrison and change the building's ownership.

configuration,property	Brush
Brush Size
The Brush has a configurable size property, defined by the side length of the square.

competition,competition outcome,scoring,victory condition	Alliance
Instance Points
Instance Points accumulated by an alliance determine the winner of the GVG instance when the valid time expires.<SEP>An Alliance earns Instance Points in the GvG Instance by capturing Contestable Buildings and defeating enemy Player Troops.

healing enhancement,resource efficiency	Hospital Building
Player
The Hospital Building allows players to heal wounded troops with reduced resource costs and no upper limit while inside the instance.

point contribution,scoring mechanism	GVG Instance Total Points
Neutral Buildings
Points earned from occupying and holding Neutral Buildings are added to the occupying alliance's GVG Instance Total Points.

configuration,property	Brush
Brush Color
The Brush has a configurable color property for customizing area designations.

relocation,strategic mobility	City Teleport
Player
Players can use the City Teleport function to move their city within the instance, facilitating strategic positioning.

configuration,point value setting	Neutral Buildings
data_constant.xlsx
The file data_constant.xlsx is used to configure the temporary point values awarded for occupying Neutral Buildings.

scoring period,time constraint	GVG Instance Total Points
Instance Valid Time
The accumulation of GVG Instance Total Points occurs only within the Instance Valid Time, after which the winner is decided.

consumable usage,process acceleration	Acceleration Items
Hospital Building
Acceleration Items from a player's backpack can be consumed to speed up the healing process in the Hospital Building.

defense,occupation maintenance	Garrison Troops
Player
Players from the occupying alliance station Garrison Troops in a Neutral Building to defend it from attacks.

configuration management,parameter setting	Level Editor Blackboard Function
Neutral Buildings
The Level Editor Blackboard Function is used to schedule and determine the configuration for points and intervals provided by each Neutral Building.

method type,strategic relocation	City Teleport
Fixed-Point Teleport
Fixed-Point Teleport is one of the two specific methods of City Teleport available to players within the instance.

coordinated attack,military cooperation	Player
Rallied Troops
Players can form Rallied Troops with alliance members to launch a stronger assault on a Neutral Building.

combat history,information access	Battle Report
Neutral Buildings
Players can click on a Neutral Building to view Battle Reports detailing the combat that has occurred there.

method type,unpredictable relocation	City Teleport
Random Teleport
Random Teleport is one of the two specific methods of City Teleport available to players within the instance.

relocation possibility,territorial movement	City Teleport
Spawn Area
City Teleport functions allow a player's city to be moved, potentially even into an opposing alliance's Spawn Area.

individual assault,military action	Personal Troops
Player
Players can attack Neutral Buildings using their Personal Troops without assistance from other players.

capacity,containment	Spawn Area
Spawn Point
A Spawn Area contains multiple Spawn Points, with the number equal to the maximum team size for the instance.

instance isolation,state preservation	Player
Player Personal Data Snapshot
A Player Personal Data Snapshot is taken when a player first enters the instance, isolating their in-instance state from changes on the home server.

entry condition,participation	GvG Instance
Player
A Player must meet specific conditions (no troops, no wounded soldiers, main city not in combat) to enter the GvG Instance.

competition,participation	Alliance
GvG Instance
Two Alliances compete against each other within the GvG Instance, with members participating or spectating.

protection,restriction	Original Server
Player
When a Player enters a GvG Instance, their actions in the Original Server are restricted (cannot send troops), and their Main City gains a Protective Shield.

communication,event status	GvG Instance
Notification Email
Notification Emails are sent to announce the opening and closing of the GvG Instance.

access control,interaction	Player
UI Interface
A Player interacts with the UI Interface to view the GvG Instance and click the 'Enter' or 'Spectate' button based on their participation status.

automatic application,defensive effect	Main City
Protective Shield
A Player's Main City automatically gains a Protective Shield when the player first enters a GvG Instance, lasting until the instance ends.

initial placement,team segregation	GvG Instance
Spawn Area
Upon first entering the GvG Instance, players from each Alliance are placed in designated Spawn Areas (e.g., top-left and bottom-right).

occupation,sequential assignment	Player
Spawn Point
A Player's Main City occupies a Spawn Point within their Alliance's Spawn Area upon entering the GvG Instance, assigned in order of entry.

data display,real-time update	Point Refresh
UI Interface
The UI Interface refreshes the displayed Instance Points for both alliances each time a player opens it.

access control,scenery	GvG Instance
One-Way Air Wall
One-Way Air Walls are placed in the GvG Instance scenario using a Map Editor to control movement between Spawn Areas and combat zones.

prerequisite,resource management	Inner City Hospital
Player
A Player must ensure their Inner City Hospital has no Wounded Soldiers to be eligible to enter the GvG Instance.

categorization,placement tool	One-Way Air Wall
World Building
The One-Way Air Wall is a type of World Building placed into the GvG instance scenario using the Map Editor.

communication,notification	GVG Activity
Registration Notification Email
Successful registration for the GVG activity triggers the sending of a notification email to all alliance members.

objective,point generation	Contestable Building
GvG Instance
Contestable Buildings are neutral objectives in the GvG Instance that generate Instance Points for the occupying alliance over time and upon capture.

configuration,modification	Configuration Table
Level Editor File
Both the configuration table and the level editor file must be modified together to change the participant limit.

condition,prerequisite	Battle Status
Player
A Player's Main City must not have Battle Status for the player to be eligible to enter the GvG Instance.

content display,implementation	Registration Notification Email
UI Template
The member list in the registration notification email is to be displayed using a UI template that project teams implement themselves.

demonstration,eligibility	Alliance
Framework Demo Version
In the framework demo version, alliances must meet specific conditions (like ranking or member count) to be eligible to register for the GVG activity.

conclusion,distribution	GvG Instance
Reward Email
After the GvG Instance ends, a Reward Email is sent to players so they can view their rewards.

combat verification,subtype	Contestable Building
Garrisoned Building
Contestable Buildings serve as Garrisoned Buildings to verify the game's attack and defense mechanics within the GvG Instance.

interface component,selection	GVG Activity Registration Interface
Session List
The GVG activity registration interface contains a session list component for players to select which event sessions to participate in.

data reference,rule application	InstanceTag Table
Participant List
The tag selection rules for participants in the GVG activity are defined in and referenced from the InstanceTag table.

eligibility,role assignment	Participation List
Player
A Player's presence on the Participation List determines if they can enter the GvG Instance to fight or only Spectate.

initiation,user interaction	Player
Sign-Up Button
The player clicks the sign-up button to initiate the GVG activity registration process.

development,implementation	GVG Activity
GVG Framework
The GVG Framework is designed to facilitate the complete lifecycle of the GVG Activity through functional development.

UI component,selection mechanism	Checkbox
Session List
Checkboxes are the UI components within the session list that allow players to select which GVG activity sessions to participate in.

interface component,management	GVG Activity Registration Interface
Participant List
The GVG activity registration interface contains a participant list component for selecting which alliance members will participate and assigning them tags.

configuration,management	Activity System
GVG Activity
The GVG Activity is configured and managed through the Activity System using spreadsheet configurations.

configuration template,modeling	Strongest Commander Activity
activity.xlsx
The activity.xlsx file uses the configuration method of the Strongest Commander Activity as a reference for setting up the GVG series.

conditional access,interface navigation	GVG Activity Registration Interface
Sign-Up Button
Clicking the sign-up button, after eligibility checks, opens the detailed GVG activity registration interface.

selection mechanism,status marking	Checkbox
Participant List
Checkboxes in the participant list are used to mark alliance members as participants and to assign tags to them.

configuration,reference	GVG Activity
activity.xlsx
The stages and rules of the GVG Activity are defined in the activity.xlsx configuration file.

accessibility,information dissemination	GVG Announcement Activity
Player
The GVG Announcement Activity is visible to all Players on the server through the activity interface.

eligibility,participation	Alliance
GVG Sign-up Activity
The GVG Sign-up Activity allows eligible Alliances to register their members for the competition.

initiation,phase sequence	GVG Activity
GVG Announcement Activity
The GVG Activity series begins with the GVG Announcement Activity phase.

phase sequence,registration	GVG Activity
GVG Sign-up Activity
Following the announcement, the GVG Sign-up Activity phase allows alliances to register.

interface display,user interaction	GVG Announcement Activity
UI
The GVG Announcement Activity is presented to the player through a specific UI screen.

phase sequence,result display	GVG Activity
GVG Matching Result Publicity
After sign-up closes, the GVG Matching Result Publicity phase shows the matchmaking outcomes.

configuration,design	GVG Instance
Level Editor
The GVG Instance's internal gameplay logic and rules are designed and configured using the Level Editor.

component,visual representation	GVG Announcement Interface
UI
The UI includes the GVG Announcement Interface as a specific screen for displaying activity preview information.

competition start,phase sequence	GVG Activity
GVG Instance Opening
The GVG Instance Opening phase follows matching, allowing players to enter the combat instance.

asset placement,environment design	GVG Instance
Map Editor
The physical layout and world buildings within the GVG Instance are created and placed using the Map Editor.

conclusion,phase sequence	GVG Activity
GVG Results Display
The GVG Activity series concludes with the GVG Results Display phase.

execution,hosting	GVG Activity
Instance Server
Specific phases of the GVG Activity, like the instance opening, trigger functionality on the Instance Server.

accessibility,observation	GVG Instance
Spectator Function
The Spectator Function allows players to watch the events taking place inside the GVG Instance.

data management,social functions	Alliance Server
GVG Activity
Phases of the GVG Activity interact with the Alliance Server for guild-related data and sign-up processing.

data management,state sharing	Instance Server
Instance Server Blackboard
The Instance Server utilizes the Instance Server Blackboard functionality to manage and share data during the GVG Instance.

testing aid,visualization	Battlefield LOD Function
GVG Instance
The Battlefield LOD Function provides a simplified visual representation of the GVG Instance for testing and validation purposes.

player interaction,state management	GVG Activity
Game Server
The GVG Activity interfaces with the Game Server to affect player states and display activity interfaces.

battle analysis,data generation	Combat Report
GVG Instance
Battles within the GVG Instance generate Combat Reports that detail the attacks and defenses on specific buildings.

conclusion,outcome processing	GVG Instance
Instance Settlement and Rewards
The GVG Instance concludes with the Instance Settlement and Rewards phase, which processes scores and distributes prizes.

content organization,information hierarchy	Home Page
Vision And Goals
The home page contains a section dedicated to describing the vision and goals of the knowledge space.

alignment,guidance	Team Members
Vision And Goals
The vision and goals section is described to help team members understand objectives and work towards them.

audience definition,information targeting	Knowledge Space Introduction
Team Members
The knowledge space introduction section describes the main content and the member groups it is intended for.

content organization,information hierarchy	Home Page
Knowledge Space Introduction
The home page includes a section that introduces the knowledge space's content and audience.

content organization,resource aggregation	Common Documents And Links
Home Page
The home page features a section for aggregating and providing quick access to common documents and links.

content organization,user support	Home Page
Knowledge Space Help
The home page provides a help section with guidelines and contact information for using the knowledge space.

access point,structural component	Home Page
Knowledge Space
The home page serves as the primary interface and access point for the knowledge space.
